command.theme: Why mission-planning tools should run offline first
command.notes: An opinion thread with a real argument spine: claim (offline-first), mechanism (field teams lose connectivity), verified anchor (our solver runs offline as of this beta), stake (a dropped link can scrub a window). Reframe, not assertion-stacking.

exercises: structure: complete argument spine (claim, mechanism, anchor, stake) — guards against FM.WEAK_ARG
fact-safety: the anchor (offline solver) traces to project context; the rest is clearly interpretation
reviewer_note: A thesis piece that argues rather than asserts. The one interpretive causal link ('offline-first is why field teams trust us') is advisory at most — both endpoints are verified.
